comment: RFC 0004 D11 duplication budget. P0 = REPORTING-ONLY: no `threshold`, so jscpd prints the duplication report (the five-policy + five-substrate-selector clones D4 removes) but NEVER exits non-zero — it cannot fail the gate while those clones still exist. P3 promotes to `jscpd:strict` (--threshold 1) once D4 has collapsed the clones, so the threshold lands the moment the tree can pass it.
